queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of having no checking account to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk reduction associated with loan purposes for the purchase of radio or TV.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the correlation between a checking account balance below zero DM and decreased credit risk.
